_publications._publicationTitle: Small Extracellular Vesicles Derived from NF2-Associated Schwannoma Cells Modulate Tumor Progression and Immunity via HSP90.

_contextSnippet: Protein analysis via western blotting confirmed the presence of CD81 and CD9 in NF2-EVs
details: Successfully confirmed presence of CD81 in NF2-EVs via western blotting
